claims: The skill description requires running `sudo` commands to remove and install system packages (ffmpeg, PipeWire) as prerequisites, which necessitates root access. This could be excessive for the stated purpose of camera capture, video processing, audio recording, and mission logic, as these tasks might be achievable with standard user permissions or less intrusive, user-space alternatives without modifying core system software.
